channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Journalist Don Lemon is set to be arraigned in Minnesota church protest case
item.description: Former CNN host Don Lemon and four other people are set to be arraigned on federal civil rights charges in Minnesota, accused in a protest at a church in St.

item.title: Affordable housing residents near Portland ICE building to ask judge to limit feds’ use of tear gas
Prosecutors to dismiss charges against men accused of assaulting ICE officer in Minneapolis
